name: 007-agentic-approach
description: /// <summary> /// Represents a Git repository that serves as the central repository for managing all agent-related information /// and configurations necessary for creating agentic Power BI workflows. /// </summary> /// <remarks> /// This repository is responsible for: /// - Storing and retrieving agent definitions and metadata /// - Managing agent configurations for Power BI workflow automation /// - Persisting agent state and workflow specifications /// - Providing data access operations for agentic Power BI workflow creation and orchestration /// </remarks>
